notes: 6 stages: passthrough, exp_only, softmax_w_stable, softmax_w_unstable, softmax_h_stable, softmax_h_unstable. CB layout: 0=input(R), 8=scaler(1), 16=out(2), 24=max(1), 25=exp(R), 26=recip_sum(1)

description: Data pipeline: reader loads R tiles per work unit, compute copies input to output via copy_tiles, writer stores tiles. dim=-1 only for this stage.

approach: TensorAccessor-based tile reading, R tiles per work unit with contiguous (dim=-1) and strided (dim=-2) page_id logic. prepare_reduce_scaler called once for cb_scaler.
copy_tiles with WaitAndPop and NONE reconfig from cb_input to cb_out, R tiles per work unit. compute_kernel_hw_startup(cb_input, cb_scaler, cb_out) called first.
TensorAccessor-based tile writing, R tiles per work unit with contiguous (dim=-1) and strided (dim=-2) page_id logic. Waits for R tiles from cb_out, writes, then pops.
Fixed writer to wait/pop 1 tile at a time to match double-buffered cb_out (2 pages). Compute pushes 1 tile at a time via copy_tiles, so writer must consume 1 at a time to avoid deadlock when R>2.

upstream_fixes: Fixed writer to wait/pop 1 tile at a time to match double-buffered cb_out

description: Add exp post-op to copy_tiles in compute kernel. Reader and writer unchanged.

approach: Added exp_post_op lambda to copy_tiles call. exp_tile_init() + exp_tile(dst_idx) applied per tile before packing.

cb_summary: c0:R_push/R_pop(1-at-a-time) c8:1_push/unused c16:1_push_per_tile/1_wait_per_tile. Same as passthrough, only SFPU exp added in DST.

description: Full 4-phase softmax compute: reduce<MAX>, sub<COL>+exp, reduce<SUM>+recip, mul<COL>. Uses binary_op_init_common instead of compute_kernel_hw_startup. Need to switch init and implement all 4 phases with correct CB flow.

approach: Full 4-phase softmax: reduce<MAX,REDUCE_ROW,WaitUpfrontNoPop> -> sub<COL,NoWaitNoPop,WaitAndPopPerTile>+exp -> reduce<SUM,WaitUpfrontNoPop>+recip -> mul<COL,NoWaitNoPop,WaitAndPopPerTile>. Also added unstable path (copy+exp, sum+recip, mul). binary_op_init_common replaces compute_kernel_hw_startup. cb_wait_front(cb_scaler,1) before loop.
